character: Hunk Mao is a funny, heroic, slightly chaotic orange tabby cat mascot with a confident expression, big expressive eyes, chunky cute proportions, and a playful internet-meme personality.
style: dense colorful illustrated poster art, cute but clever, packed with tiny readable signs, stickers, props, hidden easter eggs, social media meme energy, polished Instagram square composition
must_include: tiny hidden jokes and easter eggs
